---
name: Research task
about: Propose a sourced research task, literature note, evaluation question, or methodology improvement.
title: "[Research] "
labels: research, needs source
assignees: ""
---

## Question

What concrete question should this task answer?

## Repository

Which repository should hold the work?

## Proposed deliverable

Describe the artifact: note, table, dataset review, benchmark task, methodology change, or pull request.

## Sources

List public sources, prior work, papers, official pages, or datasets.

## Scope and limitations

What is included, what is excluded, and what remains uncertain?

## Definition of done

- [ ] Sources are linked.
- [ ] Facts and interpretation are separated.
- [ ] Limitations are explicit.
- [ ] The result is reviewable by someone who was not part of the original discussion.
